claimText: Key achievements under the National Logistics Policy (2022–2025)
evidenceExcerpt: Key achievements under the National Logistics Policy (2022–2025)
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: * Logistics Ease Across Different States (LEADS) Index: To promote competitive federalism among states and supporting India’s rise in the World Bank’s Logistics Performance Index 2023.
evidenceExcerpt: * Logistics Ease Across Different States (LEADS) Index: To promote competitive federalism among states and supporting India’s rise in the World Bank’s Logistics Performance Index 2023.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: * LEADS Index assesses logistics performance across States and UTs.
evidenceExcerpt: * LEADS Index assesses logistics performance across States and UTs.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: * LEADS 2025 introduces performance assessment of 5–7 key corridors (journey time, truck speed, waiting periods) and API-based evaluation of section-wise speeds on major road corridors.
evidenceExcerpt: * LEADS 2025 introduces performance assessment of 5–7 key corridors (journey time, truck speed, waiting periods) and API-based evaluation of section-wise speeds on major road corridors.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: * Unified Logistics Interface Platform (ULIP): It has facilitated secure API integration across more than 30 digital systems, enabling over 160 crore digital transactions as of August 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: * Unified Logistics Interface Platform (ULIP): It has facilitated secure API integration across more than 30 digital systems, enabling over 160 crore digital transactions as of August 2025.
